## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check . && ruff format --check .` passes locally
- [ ] `mypy apps/cli/shield --strict --ignore-missing-imports` passes locally

- [ ] Progress tracker in `.github/copilot-instructions.md` updated (if applicable)
